config.html:
Scaffold từ DQHF — form gốc: frm_banhanggo_DanhSachDeXuatPhoi, frm_banhanggo_DanhsachDeXuatPhoi_NgayGiaoPhoi
Nút WinForms gốc: Lưu · Đóng
Nút cần gắn thêm: Xoá (procedure/records.delete) · In (cần print template entity) · Xuất (export)
Proc cần port: BG_DEXUAT_PHOI_BANGO_GETALL, TR_DEXUAT_PHOI_CHITIET_GET, TR_DEXUAT_PHOI_CHITIET_GETALL, TR_DEXUAT_PHOI_CHITIET_GETALL3, TR_DEXUAT_PHOI_CHITIET_UPDATE, TR_DEXUAT_PHOI_FINISH, TR_DEXUAT_PHOI_GETALL, TR_DEXUAT_PHOI_GETBYID, TR_DEXUAT_PHOI_NOT_FINISH, TR_DEXUAT_PHOI_UPDATE, TR_DEXUAT_PHOI_CHITIET_GETALL4, TR_DEXUAT_PHOI_NGAYGIAOPHOI
Entity phụ (lookup/filter cân nhắc thêm): tr_dexuat_phoi
